title: At a BBQ Restaurant 烧烤店

lines.zh: 这家烧烤店闻起来太香了！

lines.en: Let us sit outside. I love eating outside.
lines.zh: 我们坐外面吧。我喜欢在室外吃。

lines.en: I want some lamb skewers and chicken wings.
lines.zh: 我要一些羊肉串和鸡翅。

lines.en: I would like some corn and mushrooms too.
lines.zh: 我还想要一些玉米和蘑菇。

lines.en: Do you want spicy or not spicy?
Let us also get some sodas.
I am so hungry. Food cannot come fast enough!
lines.zh: 我太饿了。食物怎么还不上来！
